jobs.jobs_info: Chandigarh MC Vacancy 2026: The Chandigarh Administration has approved direct recruitment for 276 regular posts in the Municipal Corporation, marking the first major hiring drive since 2021. Currently, 3,842 of the 5,611 sanctioned posts are vacant, leaving approximately 65% ​​of the workforce vacant. The recruitment drive will cover a variety of roles, including 118 clerks, 79 firemen, and 33 drivers. The official notification and application process will begin once the recruiting agency is finalized.

jobs.title: Rajasthan Van Mitra Vacancy 2026, 80000 Van Mitra, Apply Now
how_to_apply: निर्धारित आवेदन पत्र प्राप्त करना होगा।
आवेदन पत्र सावधानीपूर्वक भरना होगा।
आवश्यक दस्तावेज संलग्न करने होंगे।
आवेदन अपने जिले के उप वन संरक्षक (DCF) कार्यालय में जमा करना होगा।
jobs.jobs_info: Rajasthan Van Mitra Vacancy 2026: राजस्थान सरकार ने पर्यावरण संरक्षण, वृक्षारोपण और वन्यजीवों की सुरक्षा को जनभागीदारी से मजबूत बनाने के उद्देश्य से Rajasthan Van Mitra Yojana 2026 शुरू की है। इस योजना के तहत पूरे प्रदेश में लगभग 80,000 वन मित्रों का पंजीयन करने का लक्ष्य रखा गया है। यह कोई नियमित सरकारी भर्ती नहीं है, बल्कि स्वैच्छिक (Voluntary) पंजीयन योजना है। आवेदन ऑफलाइन माध्यम से संबंधित जिले के उप वन संरक्षक (Deputy Conservator of Forests – DCF) कार्यालय में निर्धारित आवेदन पत्र के माध्यम से करना होगा। वर्तमान में आवेदन की अंतिम तिथि का उल्लेख नहीं किया गया है, क्योंकि अलग-अलग जिलों में आवश्यकता के अनुसार पंजीयन प्रक्रिया शुरू की जाएगी। इस योजना में वेतन नहीं दिया जाएगा, लेकिन चयनित वन मित्रों को प्रशिक्षण, पहचान पत्र, आवश्यक सामग्री, सम्मान तथा अन्य सुविधाएं उपलब्ध कराई जाएंगी।

There will be no online application process; instead, candidates will be required to appear directly at the recruitment site in their district on the scheduled date with all original documents.

jobs.jobs_info: Mahendergarh Health Department Vacancy 2026: Health Department Haryana Olo Civil Surgeon Mahendragarh at Narnaul. All the general public is informed that deployment of Domestic Breeding Checker on 30 posts in the District Malaria Office, Narnaul, is to be done on first come first serve basis for 06 months (June to 30 November 2026). Volunteers should apply only after clearly understanding that this is not a job but a form of community service on their part. For which only an honorarium of Rs 586/- will be given as per rules, and work will be taken for 20 days in a month; those volunteers who have worked as Domestic Breeding Checker for 5 years continuously will not be given work. This is not salary. Interested candidates may submit their documents (Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Bank Pass Book, Photocopy of Educational Certificate (Minimum 5th Class, etc. and 2 Passport Size Photographs) and Application Form by 22.07.2025 at the District Malaria Office, Narnaul, 2nd Floor, District Civil Hospital Narnaul by 04:00 PM.

jobs.title: Barnala Court Worker And Guard Vacancy 2026, Check Eligibility Criteria & How to Apply
how_to_apply: Start Date: 14-07-2026
Last Date: 05-08 -2026
Skill Test / Interview: Notify Later
jobs.jobs_info: Barnala Court Worker and Guard Vacancy 2026: The Office of the District & Sessions Judge, Barnala has issued a notification for the positions of Worker and Guard. Eligible candidates are requested to apply in the proforma given below along with complete Bio-data, self attested copy of relevant testimonial i.e. proof of qualification, date of birth, category, two recent passport size photographs, one of which should be pasted on the top right side of the proforma, by 5:00 PM on 05.08.2026 in the office of the undersigned for filling up one post of Worker and one post of Guard on purely contract basis for the financial year 2026-27 at the rate fixed by the Deputy Commissioner, Bamla from time to time, as per the details given below:-

vacancy_details.eligibility: Must be a Matriculation pass and must have knowledge of the Punjabi language (as mentioned in the Selection Criteria for Worker in National Minimum Guidelines for Establishment and Running of Crèches under the Maternity Benefit Act, 2017 issued by the Hon’ble Punjab and Haryana High Court).
Knowledge of the Punjabi language should be up to middle class (as applicable for Group-D posts in this session division)

jobs.title: Army Canteen Jaipur Recruitment 2026, Check Eligibility & How to Apply
how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below.
Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.).
Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview.
Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification.
The envelope containing the application should be superscribed “Application for the post of __________________________.”
The application should be submitted to: “The Sapta Shakti Canteen Cell, Sawai Jai Singh Marg, Bani Park Jaipur (Rajasthan)-302016”

vacancy_details.eligibility: Degree/ Diploma in Hardware/ Software/ IT/ Networking/ Inventory Management System OR Experience: Experience In Handling Of IT Equipment

jobs.title: Rewari Ayush Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026, Apply Now
jobs.salary_pay_scale: Selected candidates will be given an honorarium of ₹8,000 per month.
selection_process: After scrutiny of the application, eligible candidates will be called for further selection process.
how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below.
Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.).
Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview.
Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification.

The application should be submitted to: District Ayurvedic Officer, Ayush Bhawan, 1st Floor, HUDA Dispensary, Sector-4, Rewari, Haryana

vacancy_details.eligibility: A degree or diploma in Yoga from a recognized university or institute.If the Yoga degree or diploma is obtained through distance mode, the institution concerned must be recognized by the DEC/UGC/AICTE.
